creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=e236cae61f5260a7e64e6262a1441ebbca1ecd02

commit e236cae61f5260a7e64e6262a1441ebbca1ecd02
Author:     Sergei Vyshenski <svysh.fbsd@gmail.com>
AuthorDate: 2022-06-11 00:41:19 +0000
Commit:     Li-Wen Hsu <lwhsu@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2022-06-11 00:41:19 +0000

    security/p5-openxpki*: Update to 3.20.0

    - Update two ports sharing the same distribution
            3.18.2 -> 3.20.0 (major stable release)
    Changes: https://github.com/openxpki/openxpki/compare/v3.18.2...v3.20.0

    New Features
    + Support RSA-OAEP in SCEP
    + DBI driver using native DBD::MariaDB

    Upgrades, Improvements and Bugfixes
    + Upgrade UI to NodeJS 16
    + Fix issues with UTF8 inputs
    + Fix issues with UTF8 in SMTP
    + Improve OpenAPI Spec

    Removals, Deprecations, Breaking Changes
    + Drop support for older browser (IE11 is no longer supported)

    PR:             264371

 security/p5-openxpki/Makefile      | 5 +++--
 security/p5-openxpki/distinfo      | 6 +++---
 security/p5-openxpki/pkg-plist     | 8 ++++++++
 5 files changed, 18 insertions(+), 9 deletions(-)
